meta.name: Warriors of Light (8-bit)
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color :root tokens. Suggest changing --radius to 0px (sharp 8-bit corners), removing box-shadows, and replacing --font-family with a monospaced pixel font (e.g., 'Press Start 2P') to complete the retro illusion.

bg.desc: Pure black — the classic NES battle and overworld void

panel.desc: Pure black — replicating the iconic opaque menu boxes

panel-2.desc: Slight lift for dropdowns, avoiding pure black overlap

line.desc: Stark NES white — the iconic, unmistakable double-line menu border

line-soft.desc: NES gray for subtle inner dividers

text.desc: Stark NES white for all primary dialogue and stats

muted.desc: Light gray for inactive menu items or low MP

faint.desc: Dark gray for empty slots and tertiary text

accent.desc: Black Mage Blue — primary interactive accent

accent-dk.desc: Deep royal blue — dark focus border or active state

gold.desc: Gil Yellow / Treasure — highlights and currency

crystal-water.desc: Water Crystal analog - classic NES blue

done.desc: Cure Green — healthy HP or completed status

done-dk.desc: Darker shade of the healthy state

excluded.desc: Dark crimson — Stone/Petrified or disabled state

danger.desc: Fighter Red / Fire Magic — critical HP or error
